raw_consumer_statement: In eary XXXX of 2024 I filed a dispute against a merchant, XXXX XXXX for a delivery I did not receive, I notified the Merchant and also proceeded to file a dispute with American Express. Did not here anything from American Express until they sent me a pdf that included a statement from the merchant and a decison that I was responsible. Why would Amex not provide this information to me before making a decision? I sent 2 emails ( attached ), one on XXXX and one on XXXX regarding this dispute to : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  NY XXXX XXXX Chairman and XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  NY XXXX XXXX On XXXX I received a message saying I was still responsible. I refuted what the XXXX told Amex and its clear through the email exchange that he is not being truthfull. Amex is placing the entire burden on me when there has been nothing from any USPS investigation.
